name: Bat Hotel
short_description: Bat Hotel, an agility and casual game, exercise your fingers, challenge your reactivity, and help you get some relaxation.
detailed_description:
Bat Hotel is a casual game with agility and role-playing elements. Observe and then discover the movement patterns of different enemies and traps. You will control the movement of a magic perfume bottle to purify evil energy in a hotel attacked by dark forces and help all the hotel guests out of trouble. Press the key as fast as you can!

[Background Story]
As the most famous magician in the town, you were assigned to investigate a hotel in the outskirts of town. A group of girls traveling throughout this place wants to have a rest, but they are in trouble now. They need help immediately. Watch out, one of them is the incarnation of evil.

[Game Features]
-The attack speed depends on the speed of your keystrokes
-Every normal hotel guests have 2 states of clothing
-different enemy groups at each level
-an atmosphere of horror
-8 diffenrent characters for 8 battles

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Russian
